name: Many Suns Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Passion fruit pulp or juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently combine all ingredients in a glass bowl.
2. Chill the mixture thoroughly.
3. Garnish with mint leaves.
Nutritional information per serving: 26 calories; .4g protein, 7g carbohydrates, 3% fat (tr).
